scripts.dev:auto: PORT=${PORT:-3000}; while lsof -nP -iTCP:$PORT -sTCP:LISTEN >/dev/null 2>&1; do PORT=$((PORT+1)); done; echo "Starting dev server on port $PORT"; next dev --webpack --port $PORT
scripts.build:android: npm run guard:android-build && FOODZAP_STATIC_EXPORT=true next build && npx cap sync android
scripts.guard:server-build: node -e "if (process.env.FOODZAP_STATIC_EXPORT === 'true') { console.error('FOODZAP_STATIC_EXPORT must be unset for serverful builds. Use npm run build:android for static export.'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.guard:android-build: node -e "if (process.env.FOODZAP_STATIC_EXPORT && process.env.FOODZAP_STATIC_EXPORT !== 'true') { console.error('FOODZAP_STATIC_EXPORT must be true for Android static builds.'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.android:restart: npm run build:android && npx cap run android
